title: Weather Staff
description: Add a wand to control the weather.
body:
Add a wand to control weather.
This mod adds the wand itself and 3 powders. First, you will need intermediate materials to get the items for this mod. If you have 1 gunpowder and 4 copper ingots, you can make it at the workbench. And as for the cane, it can be made with lapis lazuli, a stick and intermediate materials. And for the three powders, you need four torches and the intermediate material to make it sunny, four lapis lazuli and the intermediate material to make it rainy, and a lightning rod and the intermediate material to make it thunderstorm. To change the weather, first right-click on the wand to bring up the GUI, then put one of the gunpowder in the slot, and finally right-click while sneaking the wand.
Recipe
